8:59:3.m: those who (describing كَفَرُوا۟ - they who disbelieved)

8:59:6.m: indeed they (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)

8:59:8.m: they make (someone) weak/unable (referring to those who disbelieve)

8:60:9.m: the horses (object of مِن in مِن رِّبَاطِ)

8:60:10.m: you all terrify (the enemy of Allah and your enemy)

8:60:19.m: you all know them (referring to other enemies mentioned in 8:60)

8:60:22.m: and whatever (that is spent in the path of Allah)

8:60:23.m: you (all) spend (in the way of اللَّهِ)

8:60:29.m: it will be fulfilled completely (to you all)

8:61:3.m: to the peace (object of جَنَحُوا - they incline)

8:61:4.m: then incline! (responding to their inclination to peace)

8:61:6.m: and rely completely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

تَوَكَّلْ: rely completely! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)

8:61:11.m: The All-Hearing (one of Allah's names, subject of هُوَ)

8:62:3.m: that (they want that they deceive you)

8:62:4.m: they deceive you (object of يُرِيدُوا - they want)

8:63:15.m: Allah (as the object being acted upon by أَلَّفَ - united)

َ: (as the object being acted upon by أَلَّفَ - united)

8:63:17.m: between them (connects with قُلُوبِهِمْ - their hearts)

8:63:18.m: indeed he/it (referring to Allah being عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ)

8:63:20.m: All-Wise (as a general attribute of اللَّهَ)

8:64:3.m: sufficient for you, enough for you

8:64:8.m: the believers (those who follow the Prophet ﷺ)

8:65:12.m: they overcome/will overcome (referring to the believing warriors)

8:65:15.m: he is/becomes (in a conditional phrase with إِن)

8:65:16.m: from/among you all (in if there are among you twenty)

8:65:18.m: they will overcome (referring to the twenty patient believers)

8:65:19.m: a thousand (object being overcome in يَغْلِبُوا)

8:65:26.m: they understand deeply (referring to those who disbelieve)

8:66:5.m: and he knew (connected to خَفَّفَ - He lightened)

8:66:6.m: that/indeed (introduces the fact that there is weakness)

8:66:8.m: weakness (object of عَلِمَ - what Allah knew)

8:66:9.m: and if/then if (connects to previous statement)

8:66:25.m: with (connected to ٱلصَّابِرِينَ - the patient ones)

8:67:11.m: the earth/land/ground (being acted upon by فِى)

8:68:1.m: if not for (connecting to كِتٰبٌ - a decree)

8:68:5.m: he came before (referring to كِتٰبٌ - decree)

8:68:6.m: surely would have touched/affected you all (as a consequence in لَوْلَا - if not for)

8:68:7.m: in what (referring to what you took)

8:68:8.m: you all took (referring to the Muslims being addressed)

8:69:4.m: as lawful/permissible (describing what you should eat from غَنِمْتُمْ)

8:69:5.m: as good, pure and delicious food

8:69:6.m: and you all protect yourselves! (connected to فَكُلُوا۟ - so eat)

8:69:9.m: Allah (The One True God, as the object of وَٱتَّقُوا۟)

8:70:5.m: in/within (location word for أَيْدِيكُم - your hands)

8:70:6.m: your hands (referring to the prisoners of war being addressed)

8:70:14.m: something better (object of يُؤْتِكُمْ - He will give you)

ًا: (object of يُؤْتِكُمْ - He will give you)

8:70:16.m: any good/goodness (that Allah knows in your hearts)

8:70:17.m: from what (that was taken from you)

8:70:22.m: And Allah (as the subject of يَغْفِرْ - forgives)

8:70:23.m: one who constantly forgives (attribute of اللَّهُ)

8:71:9.m: so He made possible/enabled (something) (connected to خَانُوا۟ - they betrayed)

8:72:8.m: in (location in سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ - the path of Allah)

8:72:15.m: some of them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)

هُمْ: of them (referring to the believers mentioned earlier)

8:72:20.m: and not (negates past meaning of يُهَاجِرُوا۟)

8:72:28.m: until, up to, so that (connects to يُهَاجِرُوا۟)

8:72:29.m: they migrate (referring to those who haven't yet migrated)

8:72:32.m: in (connects سَبِيلِ with what comes before it)

8:73:8.m: there would be (in the conditional phrase 'if you don't do it')

8:74:3.m: and they migrated (referring to the believers mentioned before)

8:74:11.m: those (pointing to the believers mentioned before)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to the believers mentioned before)

8:75:2.m: they believed (part of الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا - those who believe)

8:75:3.m: from (connects to بَعْدُ to mean 'from after')

8:75:11.m: the blood relations (connected to أَوْلَىٰ - more entitled)

8:75:19.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)
